description_long: This bird features a robust, rounded body with a predominantly green back and upper wings, contrasting with a black head, tail, and lower wings. Its face is marked by large, expressive white eyes and a yellowish beak that blends into a pale yellow lower face. The sides of the body display a striking red and yellow patch near the tail, adding a vivid accent to its otherwise dark rear. The tail is broad and fan-shaped, colored in a deep black with subtle feather texturing. The overall appearance is cartoonish and stylized, with smooth, simplified surfaces and exaggerated features.
description: A cartoonish bird with a green back, black head and tail, large white eyes, and a yellowish beak, accented by a red and yellow patch near the tail.
description_view_0: Front three-quarter view showing the bird's large white eyes, yellowish beak, and the green upper body with black wings and head.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the green back, black underparts, and the vivid red and yellow patch near the tail, with the broad black tail visible.
description_view_2: Rear three-quarter view emphasizing the green back, black tail, and the red and yellow patch, with less visibility of the face.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other profile, with the same green, black, and red-yellow color pattern and the large white eye.
attribute_plumage_pattern: solid green back, black head and tail, red and yellow patch near tail, pale yellow face
